zh.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene於1226年出生在英國。她和Sir Edward Webbe至少有1個女兒。她去世於1287年享年61歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene于1226年出生在英国。她和Sir Edward Webbe至少有1个女儿。她去世于1287年享年61岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ardene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name, either from the district of Arden in Warwickshire or from Arden in Bredbury (Cheshire). The first placename is thought to be derived from a Celtic word meaning ‘high place’, cognate with Ardennes, the name of a forested region on the borders between northeastern France and eastern Belgium. The second derives from Old English hēah ‘high’ + worthign ‘enclosed settlement’.

variants.name: Harden
meanings: English: variant of Arden with prosthetic H-.

English: habitational name, either from Haredene Wood in East Tisbury (Wiltshire), or from Haredon (in Ugborough, Devon). The first placename probably derives from Old English hara ‘hare’ + denu ‘valley’. The second is from Old English hara + dūn ‘hare hill’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene was born in 1226, in England. She had at least 1 daughter with Sir Edward Webbe. She died in 1287, at the age of 61.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene est née en 1226, à Angleterre. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Sir Edward Webbe. Elle est décédée en 1287, à l’âge de 61 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene wurde 1226 in England geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir Edward Webbe mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1287 im Alter von 61 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene è nata il nel 1226 nel England. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Sir Edward Webbe. Morì nel 1287, all'età di 61 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardeneは1226年にイギリスで生まれた。彼女はSir Edward Webbeとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1287年に61歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene(은)는 1226년 영국에서 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir Edward Webbe(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1287년 61세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene nasceu em 1226, em Inglaterra. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Sir Edward Webbe. Ela faleceu em 1287, com 61 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene родилась в 1226 г. в местности Англия. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Sir Edward Webbe. Она умерла в 1287 г. в возрасте 61 год.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Margaret Mary Ardene nació en 1226, en Inglaterra. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Sir Edward Webbe. Murió en 1287, a la edad de 61 años.
